title: Dynatrace Problem
description: A Dynatrace-detected problem representing an aggregated service degradation identified by the Davis AI engine. Problems correlate multiple related anomaly events into a single issue with severity, root cause analysis, and affected entity information.

problemId.description: The internal unique identifier of the problem, e.g., -1234567890123456789_V2. Used in API calls to retrieve or act on this specific problem.

displayId.description: The human-readable problem identifier displayed in the Dynatrace UI, e.g., P-123456. This is the ID referenced in notifications and alert messages.

title.description: The title of the problem, generated by the Davis AI engine to summarize the nature and scope of the detected degradation.

severityLevel.description: The severity classification of the problem, indicating the category of service impact detected by Davis AI.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the problem.

startTime.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the problem was first detected by Davis AI.

endTime.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the problem was resolved. Returns -1 if the problem is still open (status is OPEN).

affectedEntities.description: The list of entities directly affected by the problem — those where the anomaly was first detected by Davis AI.

impactedEntities.description: The list of entities experiencing service degradation as a downstream consequence of the problem, including dependent services and infrastructure.

rootCauseEntity.description: The entity identified by Davis AI as the root cause of the problem. Null if the root cause could not be determined or if insufficient data is available.

managementZones.description: The management zones that contain the affected entities. Management zones are used for access control and organizational scoping within Dynatrace.

tags.description: Tags applied to the affected entities that were relevant at the time the problem was detected. Useful for routing notifications and categorizing problems.

evidenceDetails.description: Root cause evidence collected by Davis AI, including the anomaly evidence items that contributed to problem detection and root cause determination.

totalCount.description: The total number of evidence items for this problem.

details.description: The list of individual evidence items.

items.description: A single piece of evidence contributing to root cause analysis.

comments.description: Comments attached to the problem for collaboration and tracking investigation notes.

totalCount.description: The total number of comments on this problem.

items.description: A single comment on the problem.

id.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

createdAtTimestamp.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the comment was created.

authorName.description: The display name of the comment author.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

context.description: Optional context reference, such as a ticket ID or runbook URL.

EntityStub.title: Entity Stub
EntityStub.description: A lightweight reference to a monitored entity, containing the minimum fields needed to identify and display the entity.

entityId.description: The unique Dynatrace entity identifier in the format TYPE-HEXADECIMALID, e.g., SERVICE-1234567890ABCDEF.

name.description: The display name of the entity as shown in the Dynatrace UI.

type.description: The entity type identifier, e.g., SERVICE, HOST, PROCESS_GROUP, APPLICATION.

ManagementZone.title: Management Zone
ManagementZone.description: A reference to a Dynatrace management zone, used for access control and organizational scoping.

id.description: The unique identifier of the management zone.

name.description: The display name of the management zone.

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: A tag applied to a monitored entity. Tags provide metadata for filtering, routing, and categorizing entities and problems.

context.description: The origin context of the tag, indicating how it was applied.

value.description: The value associated with the tag key. Null for tags without a value.

stringRepresentation.description: The full string representation of the tag as displayed in the Dynatrace UI. For example, [KUBERNETES]env:production or [ENVIRONMENT]team:backend.
